name: Perfectech International Holdings Limited
summary: Perfectech International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells novelties, and festival decoration and toy products in Hong Kong, other Asian countries, Europe, the United States, and internationally. It also manufactures and distributes molds; and provides management services. In addition, the company engages in the securities and property investment activities; and trades in paper bags. Perfectech International Holdings Limited was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Aberdeen, Hong Kong.
